'''Rimkar''' was a [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], circa [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], who flew a peculiar "bubble pod". His pod was destroyed by [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] in a [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] not long before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] when the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] slammed his [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] into the cliff face at [[Metta Drop]].<ref name="TCSWE" />
